artistContext.name: Seth Troxler
artistContext.summary: As a comparable youth on the scene, Seth Troxler's achievements far outweigh his tender age of 22. His Detroit roots are unmistakable and his recent relocation to Berlin has already earned him a place in the elite of the European techno scene. Seth's musical influences include the chirping of crickets, the whirring of space ships, and the sweet sounds of whistling voodoo magic. With much-hyped and played releases on revered labels such as Spectral, Wagon Repair and M_NUS, each join the dots of his distinctive sexy techno sound.

writer.title: Seth Troxler: Detroit Roots and Berlin Ascendancy
writer.subtitle: A young producer making significant waves in the European techno scene.
writer.author: A. Stern
writer.excerpt: Seth Troxler, at 22 years old, has already made a name for himself with a distinctive techno sound rooted in Detroit and refined in Berlin.

content.text: Seth Troxler is a young artist whose achievements in the techno scene already far exceed his age. His work is deeply influenced by his Detroit roots, and his recent move to Berlin has quickly established him among the elite of the European techno community.

Troxler’s sound is characterized by a distinctive blend of techno and minimal elements. His musical influences range from the organic sounds of nature to the futuristic, with references to elements such as the chirping of crickets and the whirring of space ships.
He has released work on several respected labels including Spectral, Wagon Repair, and M_NUS. These releases have been widely played and have helped define his unique approach to the genre.

Recent releases from Troxler include albums such as This Is Then, DJ-Kicks (Seth Troxler) [DJ Mix], Mixmag Presents Seth Troxler: The Illusion Nouveau (DJ Mix), Mixmag Presents Jamie Jones vs. Seth Troxler, and Love Never Sleeps.
